# DLS-Lead

> Token-driven design system for SaaS products. React + Storybook + CSS custom properties.

DLS-Lead is a design system built on a 4-layer token model (Primitives → Semantics → State → Component) with a zero custom CSS policy. All visual properties come from design tokens. Components use `data-*` attributes for variants, intents, and sizes — never `.is-*`/`.has-*` classes. Every component CSS starts with `all: unset; box-sizing: border-box;`.

## Getting Started

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Project instructions, commands, critical rules, repo layout
- [specs/session-start.md](specs/session-start.md): Checklist for every UI task

## Token System

- [specs/tokens/README.md](specs/tokens/README.md): Token architecture overview
- [specs/tokens/token-reference.md](specs/tokens/token-reference.md): Complete token reference
- [specs/tokens/color-tokens.md](specs/tokens/color-tokens.md): Color token system
- [specs/tokens/typography-tokens.md](specs/tokens/typography-tokens.md): Typography tokens
- [specs/tokens/spacing-tokens.md](specs/tokens/spacing-tokens.md): Spacing scale
- [specs/tokens/elevation-tokens.md](specs/tokens/elevation-tokens.md): Shadow and elevation
- [specs/tokens/motion-tokens.md](specs/tokens/motion-tokens.md): Animation and transition tokens
- [tokens/tokens.json](tokens/tokens.json): Source of truth (DTCG-compliant, 4-layer model)

## Components

- [specs/components/README.md](specs/components/README.md): Components index
- [specs/schemas/component.v1.json](specs/schemas/component.v1.json): JSON Schema for component manifests

### Component Manifests (machine-readable)

95 component manifests in `specs/components/manifests/`. Each manifest contains: name, props, tokens, states, composition rules, accessibility contract, Figma mapping, usage guidance, and known deviations.

### Component Specs (human-readable)

Full component specifications in `specs/components/*.md`. Each spec covers: purpose, anatomy, props/API, states, tokens, accessibility, composition rules, and code examples.

### Figma Descriptions

109 Figma-aligned component descriptions in `specs/figma-descriptions/`. Each description includes: anatomy, Figma→Code property mapping, tokens, states, and code examples.

### Storybook

Component stories with interactive controls and play-function tests in `apps/storybook/src/stories/`. Run with `cd apps/storybook && npm run storybook` on port 6006.

## Prompts

Reusable prompt library for DLS-safe agent workflows in `prompts/`.

- [prompts/README.md](prompts/README.md): Prompt library index
- [prompts/base-agent-contract.md](prompts/base-agent-contract.md): Base contract for DLS UI sessions
- [prompts/component-scaffold-from-figma.md](prompts/component-scaffold-from-figma.md): Scaffold components from Figma
- [prompts/audit-fix-component.md](prompts/audit-fix-component.md): Audit and fix component violations
- [prompts/component-rollout.md](prompts/component-rollout.md): Component rollout workflow
- [prompts/data-table-page.md](prompts/data-table-page.md): Build data table pages
- [prompts/dashboard-page.md](prompts/dashboard-page.md): Build dashboard pages
- [prompts/settings-page.md](prompts/settings-page.md): Build settings pages
- [prompts/form-dialog.md](prompts/form-dialog.md): Build form dialogs
- [prompts/dropdown-menu.md](prompts/dropdown-menu.md): Build dropdown menus
- [prompts/detail-page.md](prompts/detail-page.md): Build detail pages
- [prompts/list-page.md](prompts/list-page.md): Build list pages
- [prompts/nav-shell.md](prompts/nav-shell.md): Build navigation shells
- [prompts/auth-flow.md](prompts/auth-flow.md): Build auth flows
- [prompts/messaging-ui.md](prompts/messaging-ui.md): Build messaging UI
- [prompts/token-addition.md](prompts/token-addition.md): Add new tokens

## Critical Rules

1. **Zero custom CSS** — all classes must be `.dls-*`. No `.my-*`, `.custom-*`, `.wrapper`.
2. **No inline styles** for visual properties — use `data-*` attributes.
3. **Icons from lucide-react only** — no hand-drawn SVG, no other icon sets.
4. **Components never reference L1 primitives** — use L4 component → L2 semantic fallback.
5. **Variants via `data-*` attributes** — never `.is-*`/`.has-*` classes.
6. **Every component CSS starts with** `all: unset; box-sizing: border-box;`.
7. **Hover**: `:hover:not(:disabled)`. **Focus**: `:focus-visible` (not `:focus`).
8. **Focus ring**: `box-shadow` (never `outline`).
9. **No hardcoded values** — colors, sizes, radii all come from tokens.
